heading: Vacancies
label: 74 Vacancies
text: Any vacancy in the board shall be filled by appointment by the remaining directors, and any director so appointed shall hold his place until the next election.
notes: CodificationR.S. § 5148 derived from , , which was the National Bank Act. See .act June 3, 1864, ch. 106, § 1013 Stat. 102section 38 of this title
